nasb.text: I will consecrate the tent of meeting and the altar; I will also consecrate Aaron and his sons to minister as priests to Me.

esv.text: I will consecrate the tent of meeting and the altar. Aaron also and his sons I will consecrate to serve me as priests.

cnv.text: 我要使會幕和祭壇成聖，也要使亞倫和他的兒子成聖，作祭司事奉我。

ccb.text: “我要使会幕和祭坛圣洁，也要使亚伦父子们圣洁，做祭司事奉我。
